subcodes.first_line: O thou sincere servant of the Abha Beauty! Whatsoever thou dost witness in the realm of matter is but the evanescent shadow of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق جمال ابهی آنچه در عالم ملک مشاهده مینماای ظل زائل عالم ملکوتست
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut], @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @material world a reflection of the spiritual
